steps.title: Spot the contradiction between warning and failure
steps.content: Engineers warned against multiple track widths, but officials couldn't agree on a single width. This contradiction—between what should happen and what actually happens—is the key signal.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the transition
steps.content:
Nevertheless works because it signals a contrast: despite the engineers' warning, officials failed to implement a unified system.

The other three either wrongly present the sentences as similar (Similarly), reverse causation (For this reason), or treat them as repetition (In other words).

That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
